---
title: "Joe Allen Masterson"
image:  vantine_hi_res_2797033.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:joeamasterson@gmail.com
    - icon: telephone
      text: (847) 533-5074
      href: tel:8475335074
    - icon: file-earmark-text
      text: Resume
      href: resume.pdf
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/joe-masterson-595347266/
---

## Hi, I'm Joe Masterson

I'm a **History major with minors in Business and Environmental Studies** at 
the University of the South, Sewanee — graduating May 2026. I'm a member of 
the **Order of the Gown** academic honor society, a Division III varsity golfer, 
and a hands-on leader who thrives at the intersection of people, strategy, and 
purpose.

---

##  Education

**Bachelor of Arts — History** — The University of the South, Sewanee, TN *(May 2026)*  
Minor in Business and Environmental Studies  
GPA: 3.2 | Order of the Gown Academic Honor Society | Fall 2025 Dean's List

---

##  Experience

**Education Intern** — Chief Executive Organization, Washington, DC *(Summer 2025)*  
Supported program design and execution for high-profile executive education 
workshops serving C-suite leaders nationwide. Drafted reports and presentations 
for senior leadership, coordinated logistics for large-scale CEO events, and 
managed participant feedback to continuously improve the learning experience. 
Leveraged Microsoft Office Suite and Salesforce to streamline operations and 
communication.

**Waterfront Staff, Line Cook & Grounds Crew** — Coons Franklin Lodge, Woodruff, WI *(2020–2024)*  
Over four summers, took on expanding responsibilities across waterfront 
operations, kitchen management, and guest services at a premier Wisconsin 
lodge. Trained new kitchen staff, managed inventory, led boating and safety 
instruction, and maintained grounds and facilities to uphold the highest 
hospitality standards.

**Outside Services Intern & Golf Cart Attendant** — Conway Farms Golf Club, Lake Forest, IL *(Summer 2023)*  
Delivered exceptional member services at one of the Chicago area's most 
prestigious private clubs, managing bag handling, cart maintenance, and 
range operations.

---

##  Leadership & Activities

**Senior Leadership Board** — Sewanee *(Present)*  
Selected by Sewanee's Alumni Office and Sewanee Fund to represent the Class 
of 2026 in a competitive leadership development program focused on alumni 
engagement, philanthropy, and institutional stewardship.

**Sewanee Men's Golf — Division III Varsity** *(2022–Present)*  
Active roster member and SAA Conference Champion (2025). Member of SAAC 
(Student-Athlete Advisory Committee), a group committed to leadership, 
community impact, and athletic excellence.

**Green View Capital** — Technology & Impact Investment Sectors *(2024–2025)*  
Managed a portion of Sewanee's $2 million endowment allocation toward 
sustainable and socially responsible companies. Contributed to investment 
pitches including Alante Capital and Virtus Real Estate Fund.

**Sigma Nu Fraternity** — House Manager & Philanthropy Chair *(2022–Present)*  
Held two executive positions, overseeing house operations and organizing 
community service and fundraising initiatives for the chapter.

**Eagle Scout** — Boy Scout Troop 13, Chicago, IL *(2018)*  
Led a service project collecting 100+ boxes of school supplies, packing 150+ 
backpacks donated to Providence Englewood Charter School. Built a storage 
shelf with a fellow scout to organize remaining supplies for the school's 
Arts Department.

---

## Skills

**Technical:** Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), Salesforce, 
Final Cut Pro  
**Strengths:** Research & Writing, Event Coordination, Team Leadership, 
Public Speaking, Stakeholder Communication

---

##  Interests

Golf, hiking, travel, live music, cooking, tennis, and exploring the outdoors — 
especially the trails around the Cumberland Plateau. I believe the best 
professionals are curious, adaptable, and never stop learning.

---

## Let's Connect

📧 joeamasterson@gmail.com | 📞 (847) 533-5074

---
